children.name: Henry De Annadio Sheriff of Clackmannanshire

zh.Clackmannanshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾
zh.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadio於1245年出生在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾。他和Lady Henry Le Fitz de Annadio至少有1個兒子。他去世於1295年在蘇格蘭享年50歲。

zh-hans.Clackmannanshire, Scotland: 苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadio于1245年出生在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾。他和Lady Henry Le Fitz de Annadio至少有1个儿子。他去世于1295年在苏格兰享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: 'Ie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: pet form of   Isaac .  It was made famous in the 20th century as the nickname of the American general and president  Dwight D. Eisenhower  (  1890–1969 ), although in this case, of course, it was based on his surname.

variants.name: Isaac
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the son of Abraham, who was nearly sacrificed by his father according to a command of God which was changed at the last moment. A ram, caught in a nearby thicket, was sacrificed instead (Genesis 22:1–13). Isaac lived on to marry Rebecca and become the father of Esau and Jacob. The derivation of the name is not certain; it has traditionally been connected with the Hebrew verb meaning ‘to laugh’. It was borne by both Christians and Jews in the Middle Ages and was taken up by the Puritans in the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: Fitz'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadio was born in 1245, in Clackmannanshire, Scotland. He had at least 1 son with Lady Henry Le Fitz de Annadio. He died in 1295, in Scotland, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadio est né en 1245, à Clackmannanshire, Écosse. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lady Henry Le Fitz de Annadio. Il est décédé en 1295, à Écosse, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadio wurde 1245 in Clackmannanshire, Scotland geboren. Er hatte mit Lady Henry Le Fitz de Annadio mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1295 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadio è nato il nel 1245 nel Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lady Henry Le Fitz de Annadio. Morì nel 1295, nel Scotland, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Clackmannanshire, Scotland: スコットランドクラクマナンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadioは1245年にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアで生まれた。彼はLady Henry Le Fitz de Annadioとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1295年にスコットランドで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadio(은)는 1245년 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르에서 태어났다. 그는 Lady Henry Le Fitz de Annadio(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1295년 스컷랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadio nasceu em 1245, em Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lady Henry Le Fitz de Annadio. Ele faleceu em 1295, em Scotland, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadio родился в 1245 г. в местности клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lady Henry Le Fitz de Annadio. Он умер в 1295 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Henry 'Ie Fitz' De Annadio nació en 1245, en Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Lady Henry Le Fitz de Annadio. Murió en 1295, en Scotland, a la edad de 50 años.
